induction_input: The book the student the teacher the principal praised recommended read lost.
The software the developer the client the manager hired instructed tested crashed.
The contract the lawyer the executive the assistant contacted questioned drafted expired.

induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence featuring exactly three nested relative clauses (triply center-embedded), containing four nouns followed by four verbs (e.g., "The [Noun1] the [Noun2] the [Noun3] the [Noun4] [Verb4] [Verb3] [Verb2] [Verb1]"). Avoid simpler double-embedded structures that only contain three nouns and three verbs.
